name: No video or witnesses to my kitchen slip at work—claim doomed?
description: No, docs + statement enough for comp.[1]

mainEntity.name: No video or witnesses to my kitchen slip at work—claim doomed?

acceptedAnswer.text: No, docs + statement enough for comp.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: **No, your testimony, photos, maintenance logs prove it.** Comp doesn't need witnesses; hazard history sways.[1] Request employer records via lawyer. Consistent medical story key. Many win without video.
